type.description: ADDRESS, CHECKBOX, DATE, DATETIME, EMAIL, HTML, PHONE, RADIO, SELECTBOX, MULTISELECTBOX, TEXT, TEXTAREA, URL

multiple.description: Trigger if field can contain multiple values

pattern.description: Regular pattern for values of field

evaluated.description: Time when NPS survey score was received

ai_qa_form.description: Turn on to use this QA Form for AI QA Reviews.

initial_score.description: Enter the starting score of QA Reviews that use this QA Form. Answers to questions in the form will be added to or subtracted from this score.

minimum_score.description: Enter the minimum score of QA Reviews that use this QA Form. If the resulting score of a QA Review is lower than this score, this score will be used instead.

direction.description: If an activity comes in from the customer or out from the operator

columns.description: Definition of structure for gui and email reports

filters.description: Definition of awailable and default filters

allow_external_comments.description: Allow external user to comment on tickets in this category.

closeCheckChilds.description: Mark if all child tickets must be closed before closing or deleting ticket

auto_archive_tickets.description: Type number of days when ticket will remain closed. After typed days ticket will be archived automatically

closeCheckChilds.description: Mark if all child tickets must be closed before closing or deleting ticket

auto_archive_tickets.description: Type number of days when ticket will remain closed. After typed days ticket will be archived automatically

sla_deadtime.description: If ticket is answered (first answer) the close deadline is shown. Otherwise the first answer deadline is shown.

reopen.description: Date when the ticket will be automatically re-opened

sla_deadtime.description: If ticket is answered (first answer) the close deadline is shown. Otherwise the first answer deadline is shown.

sla_close_deadline.description: Time till when the ticket needs to be answered

sla_duration.description: Time in seconds from last change to SLA deadline

sla_custom.description: Flag if ticket's deadline was set up manually

interaction_activity_count.description: All activities connected to this ticket

reopen.description: Date when the ticket will be automatically re-opened

first_answer_duration.description: How long does it take until the ticket has been answered

first_answer_deadline.description: Time till when the ticket needs to be answered

closed.description: Date when the ticket was closed

unread.description: Flag if the ticket has not been read yet

last_unread_date.description: Date if the ticket has not been read yet

has_attachment.description: Flag if the ticket has attachment

last_activity.description: Date and time of last activity of ticket

last_activity_operator.description: Date and time of last activity of ticket from operator

last_activity_client.description: Date and time of last activity of ticket from client

cp_access_crm.description: Turn on to allow this Cloud Phone User to access the CRM Module in the Cloud Phone interface. You must have a CRM licence.
Turn on to allow this Cloud Phone User to access the CRM Module in the Cloud Phone interface. You must have a CRM licence.

tags.name: Activities/Activity
tags.description: Activities are basic entities of the Daktela contact center solution. It is a kind of a container for every specific operator's activity. The activity represents the way how the user comunicates with customers and other stakeholders, for example make or receive a call, write an email, make a comment on a ticket and handle SMS, Messenger or web chat, etc.

tags.name: Activities/Calls/CallItem
tags.description: Activities item represents full information about the call - caller, callee, user, queue, ringing time, speaking time, duration, DID, etc.

tags.name: Activities/Emails/EmailItem
tags.description: Activities item represents full information about the email - subject of email, email address, duration of answered email, attachments of email, etc.

tags.name: Activities/FBM/FBMItem
tags.description: Activities item represents Messenger chat

tags.name: Activities/IGDM/IGDMItem
tags.description: Activities item represents Instagram direct messages chat

tags.name: Activities/SMS/SMSItem
tags.description: Activities item represents SMS chat

tags.name: Activities/VBR/VBRItem
tags.description: Activities item represents Viber chat

tags.name: Activities/WAP/WAPItem
tags.description: Activities item represents WhatsApp chat

tags.name: Activities/Web/WebItem
tags.description: Activities item represents web chat

tags.name: Campaigns/Record
tags.description: Object represents campaign record.

tags.name: Campaigns/Type
tags.description: Object represents campaign records of unique call scripts.

tags.name: Crm/Account
tags.description: Object represents CRM Account/Company of Contact. One account can have more contacts, one contact can have only one account.

tags.name: Crm/Contact
tags.description: Contacts represents the person from your address book or CRM.

tags.name: Crm/Record
tags.description: CrmRecords represent universal data storage attached to Contacts or Accounts.

tags.name: Dmr/Realtime/Session
tags.description: Real time sessions object, with all details.

tags.name: Groups/Group
tags.description: Object Groups returns all information about groups (categories, queues, operators).

tags.name: Pauses/Pause
tags.description: The main object Pauses represents all defined pauses in contact center.

tags.name: Statuses/Status
tags.description: Object Statuses represents all defined statuses.

tags.name: Templates/Template
tags.description: Object Templates returns all information about templates (sms, email, web chat, messenger, whatsapp, viber) - name template, title, content template etc.

tags.name: Tickets/Category
tags.description: Categories used in tickets.

tags.name: Tickets/CustomField
tags.description: Object represents custom fields of ticket.

tags.name: Tickets/Ticket
tags.description: Tickets represent various issues and requests from your customers and other users, which need to be resolved.

tags.name: Users/User
tags.description: Object Users returns all information about the user - login name, email, accesses, rights and the relationship with other components of the contact center (categories, groups, events, templates, etc.).
